filename: Company Plans - Questions to Answer for UK and ES Markets.docx
summary: This document outlines internal market research tasks for expanding KeepMeCompany into the UK and Spanish markets, focusing on the 'Intake' sector. It lists key questions regarding pricing, customer acquisition, and competitive landscape analysis against practice management systems and pre-screening platforms. The content includes descriptions of existing online intake providers and their features to inform strategic planning.
